title: Savory Spicy Greek Lamb Kebabs
description: A garlicky and adventurous Greek dish featuring lamb, unwaxed lime, and ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly spices, perfect for a dinner gathering
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece
In a bowl, whisk together lime juice, olive oil, garlic, paprika, cumin, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper
Brush the mixture onto both sides of the lamb skewers
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the lamb is cooked to desired doneness
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving
Serve the lamb skewers hot, garnished with fresh parsley and a squeeze of lime juice
Offer a side of roasted vegetables or quinoa for a well-rounded meal
